title: callaeum coactum
intro: Callaeum coactum, also known as the monkey tree or monkey pot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Callaeum coactum is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and antiparasitic properties.
